messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "022ff79b-dc73-4e64-aaa0-af3f96c653eb", "article_id": "db429858-68c5-4d56-a222-1251cdb776de", "source_name": "The Cut", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "awards_show_attendance", "brand": "", "person": "Taylor Swift", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce made their awards-show debut as a couple Thursday night at the iHeartRadio Awards", "On Thursday, the couple appeared at the iHeartRadio Awards in Los Angeles"], "anchor_json": {"event_name": "iHeartRadio Awards", "location": "Los Angeles", "relationship_status": "fiancé/fiancée", "person": "Taylor Swift"}}, {"event_frame_id": "5caa2cd6-30b1-446e-b2bb-5b0a6ee84dfd", "article_id": "682155fc-68c8-4d2b-8984-eb09664d44ba", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "music_awards_win", "brand": "", "person": "Taylor Swift", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Swift absolutely dominated the awards, taking home seven prizes, including Artist of the Year, Album of the Year and Pop Album of the Year for The Life of a Showgirl, and Pop Song of the Year for \"The Fate of Ophelia\"", "She topped her own record for most total wins, as she is now at 41"], "anchor_json": {"event_date": "2026-03-26", "event_name": "2026 iHeartRadio Music Awards", "career_milestone": "41 total wins", "person": "Taylor Swift"}}, {"event_frame_id": "60f86fae-8310-4442-bb86-ddd89bf14e4e", "article_id": "682155fc-68c8-4d2b-8984-eb09664d44ba", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "fashion_red_carpet_look", "brand": "", "person": "Taylor Swift", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["The \"Opalite\" singer put a grown-up spin on her showgirl style in a sage-green corset top and matching miniskirt from Wiederhoeft", "Crystal fringe adorned the silky top"], "anchor_json": {"event_date": "2026-03-26", "event_name": "2026 iHeartRadio Music Awards", "designer_brand": "Wiederhoeft", "look_type": "corset top and miniskirt", "person": "Taylor Swift"}}]}
